repair_strategy: Apply split repair clamp or wraparound collar. Tighten or replace rubber ring joint. Monitor for recurrence. Can be done under live pressure — no service interruption required. Ref: WRc Pipe Repair Manual Section 3.2

action_type: Controlled dry repair with partial isolation
repair_strategy: Isolate affected section. Cut out damaged section 150 mm beyond visible defect. Install new pipe segment with repair couplings. Re-pressurize and inspect for secondary leaks. Ref: AWWA C901 / ISO 24512 Section 5.4

action_type: Dry repair with full section isolation and emergency shutdown
repair_strategy: Full pressure isolation required. Excavate pipe. Replace full pipe section using spigot-socket couplings. Disinfect and flush replacement section before returning to service. Conduct CCTV inspection of adjacent reaches. Ref: AWWA M28 / WRc No-Dig Rehabilitation

action_type: Emergency isolation — bypass and full replacement
repair_strategy: Immediate emergency isolation of zone. Deploy temporary bypass supply to maintain service. Replace full pipe length with new HDPE or PVC-U pipe. Inspect bedding and reinstate trench to specification. Notify regulator. Ref: AWWA M36 Chapter 7 / IWA Real Losses Framework
